zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fiske於大約1521年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Geoffrey Fiske51歲，母親Alice Dalling43歲。他於1549年與Sybil Gould在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 詹姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1600年7月28日在英國素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯聖 加也斯 邱奇享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可梅特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Fiske于大约1521年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德时，他的父亲Geoffrey Fiske51岁，母亲Alice Dalling43岁。他于1549年与Sybil Gould在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 聖 詹姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1600年7月28日在英国素福爾可素斯 艾爾哈姆 聖 詹姆斯聖 加也斯 邱奇享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可梅特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fiske was born about 1521, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Fiske, was 51 and his mother, Alice Dalling, was 43. He married Sybil Gould in 1549, in Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 July 1600, in St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Metfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fiske est né environ 1521, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Fiske, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Alice Dalling, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Gould en 1549, à Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1600, à St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Metfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fiske è nato il circa 1521 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey Fiske, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Alice Dalling, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Gould nel 1549, nel Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 luglio 1600, nel St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Metfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fiskeが約1521年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Fiskeは51歳，母Alice Dallingは43歳であった。1549年にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズ スト ジャムスでSybil Gouldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年7月28日にイギリススフォルクソウス エルムハム スト ジャムススト ジャムス'ス チャーチで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクメトフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. James, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스
ko.St. James, South Elmsham, Suffolk, Engla: 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 자메스
ko.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스 스트 자메스'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fiske(이)가 대략 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Fiske(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Dalling(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1549년 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 자메스에서 Sybil Gould(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1600년 7월 28일 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 자메스 스트 자메스'스 c후르치에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멧필드에 묻혔다.

pt.from about 28 July 1600 to 28 July 1602: de aproximadamente 28 de julho de 1600 a 28 de julho de 1602
pt.St. James, Suffolk, England: South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.St. James, South Elmsham, Suffolk, Engla: Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fiske nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Fiske, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dalling, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Gould em 1549, em Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1600, em St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Metfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St James's Church, South Elmham St James: ст джемес'с чурч, соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fiske родился около 1521 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Fiske было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Dalling, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Gould в 1549 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 июля 1600 г. в местности ст джемес'с чурч, соут элмхам ст джемесь, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности метфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Fiske nació aproximadamente 1521, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Fiske, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Alice Dalling, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sybil Gould en 1549, en Bury St Edmunds St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de julio de 1600, en St James's Church, South Elmham St James, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Metfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
